short_summary: Iran deal close; Tren de Aragua strike confirmed
rationale: Trump's confirmation of the Tren de Aragua leader kill and continued Iran deal diplomacy are the most US-relevant stories; both are continuations of known situations with no major new escalation.

top_events.title: Trump confirms US air strike killed Tren de Aragua gang leader
top_events.summary: Presidential confirmation of a US military strike killing the Venezuelan gang leader has domestic political salience and signals active use of military force against criminal organizations.

top_events.title: Trump condemns Beirut strikes, says Iran deal still close
top_events.summary: US-Iran nuclear deal remains unresolved while Israeli strikes on Beirut complicate diplomacy — continued uncertainty for oil markets and US Middle East commitments.

top_events.title: Thousands protest as world leaders gather for G7 summit
top_events.summary: G7 summit with Trump attending draws large protests — politically notable domestically but no immediate policy impact on daily American life.
